positive: A stylized, highly graphic illustration of cosmic flora and fauna. Focus on a central silhouette composition featuring glowing nebula swirls, stylized crescent moons, and detailed, bioluminescent cosmic ferns. The color palette should be deep indigo, cyan, electric violet, and metallic gold accents against a near-black background. The style must be a modern, neo-geometric etching mixed with vaporwave aesthetics, ensuring sharp edges and clean separations for extreme contrast on apparel. Minimalist linework, highly detailed composition, perfect symmetry.
negative: low detail, artifacts, watermark, text, blurry, grainy, noise, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, copyright, messy, photorealistic
